#  Create and View an RFI Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * ​**Prerequisites** :
    * The Reports tool must be an active tab on the project. See [Add and Remove Tools on a Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/add-and-remove-project-tools).
  * **Limitations** :
    * Any report made before 1/8/2015 will appear as a company-wide report unless a user with 'Admin' level permission to the RFIs tool and 'Admin' level permission to the Reports tool modifies it to 'Personal' or 'Project Specific.'
    * To create a custom report using the Reports tool, see [Create a Custom Company Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-company/tutorials/create-a-company-single-tool-report) or [Create a Custom Project Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-project/tutorials/create-a-project-single-tool-report).
  * **Additional Information** :
    * There is no limit to the number of custom reports that you can create with the RFIs tool on a project.
    * When you create a custom RFI report for a project, the same report will be created for all other projects if it is a Global Report.


##  Steps 
  * Create a New Report
  * View a Canned Report


### Create a New Report
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool..
  2. Click **Reports > Create New Report**.  
![Create Rfi Custom Report](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/641317d541923e34e793cb4037441fd5/b47665d9d2c77f14961479f2e2251423/create-rfi-custom-report.png?fm=webp)
  3. Continue by completing the steps in [Create a Custom Project Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-project/tutorials/create-a-project-single-tool-report).  
A link for your new report will appear under Custom Reports on the RFIs page. It will also be available for viewing in the Reports tool. See [View a Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-project/tutorials/view-a-project-report).


### View a Canned Report
  1. Navigate to the project's RFIs tool..
  2. Click **Reports** and then choose one of the reports under the **Canned Reports** heading in the menu. ![View Rfi Canned Report](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e51a1885d679750cc64e3db12e31188e/d56208ceb05e760a335be0cc29a195c4/view-rfi-canned-report.png?fm=webp)

  * [Configure Advanced Settings: RFIs](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-rfis)
title: Create and View an RFI Report
description: How to create a custom report using the project's RFIs tool.
